name: Buckwheatcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream egg yolks and sugar until foamy. Mix in flour, almonds, and baking powder.
2. Beat egg whites to a stiff meringue and fold into the flour mixture. Fill the batter into a springform pan and bake at 225°C for 10-15 minutes.
3. Mix cottage cheese and cranberries. Whip cream until stiff and fold into the mixture. Dissolve gelatine in water as directed on the package, then fold into the cheese mixture.
4. When the crust is cooled, cut once diagonally and fill with half of the cheesemix. Spread the rest on top.
5. Cool well before serving.
